description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish with ease in this pair of sandals from catwalk. Pair it with any kind of Western or ethnic wear, and look great both ways.UpperLeather straps on the upper midfoot and around the ankle with a tang claspToe holderErgonomically curved and padded footbed for comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with a slightly upraised heel and floral grooves for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
